prs.title: AWS Marketplace Discovery API Integration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Integrates AWS Marketplace Discovery API with custom client setup, search logic, two API routes, AI agent tool wiring, config changes, and documentation across ~1276 meaningful lines — a significant new integration touching multiple layers of the platform.

prs.title: Fix coach chat agent 403 error and company context selection
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small bug fix across 5 files with only 28 lines added, resolving a 403 error and company context selection issue in the chat agent.

stories.name: AWS Marketplace Channel Expansion
stories.rationale: Enabled Skematic to be discoverable and accessible through the AWS Marketplace by integrating with their Discovery API, opening a new customer acquisition channel.

stories.name: AI Coach Chat Reliability Fix
stories.rationale: Resolved a 403 authentication error and improved company context selection in the coach chat agent, restoring reliable AI coaching functionality for users.
